actions.expression:
SELECT shipmentapply.sid,
       shipmentapply.policyNo,
       shipmentapply.clientNo,
       shipmentapply.buyerNo,
       shipmentapply.shbz,
       shipmentapply.invoiceNo,
       shipmentapply.invoiceSum,
       shipmentapply.insureSum,
       shipmentapply.moneyId,
       shipmentapply.transportDate,
       shipmentapply.applicantName,
       shipmentapply.applyTime
FROM shipmentapply 
WHERE (shipmentapply.invoiceNo=:fphm) 
  AND (state="已批复") 
  AND (invoiceNo not in (
SELECT invoiceNo 
FROM ReceiptApply 
WHERE receiptFlag="完全收汇")) 
ORDER BY shipmentapply.sid DESC LIMIT 1

caption: 收汇确认

view.params:
SELECT shipmentapply.invoiceNo,shipmentapply.SID
FROM shipmentapply where (state="已批复") and (invoiceNo not in (select invoiceNo from ReceiptApply where receiptFlag="完全收汇")) 
ORDER BY shipmentapply.SID ASC

SELECT ywrybiao.yhm,ywrybiao.SID
FROM ywrybiao
ORDER BY ywrybiao.SID ASC
